item.title: Dhewm3 [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Dhewm3 [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
Dhewm3
(Shooter)
Dhewm 3 is a source port of the original Doom 3 (not Doom 3 BFG, for that you may want to try RBDoom3BFG). It's known to work on Windows, Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, OpenBSD and AROS, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.4 with ARB shaders, SDL and OpenAL.
Compared to the original version of Doom 3, Dhewm 3 has many bugfixes, supports EAX-like sound effects on all operating systems and hardware (via OpenAL Softs EFX support), has much better support for widescreen resolutions and has 64bit support.
Note that while the Doom 3 source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Dhewm 3 the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/dhewm3-appimage

[read more]
item.description:
Dhewm3
(Shooter)
Dhewm 3 is a source port of the original Doom 3 (not Doom 3 BFG, for that you may want to try RBDoom3BFG). It's known to work on Windows, Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, OpenBSD and AROS, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.4 with ARB shaders, SDL and OpenAL.
Compared to the original version of Doom 3, Dhewm 3 has many bugfixes, supports EAX-like sound effects on all operating systems and hardware (via OpenAL Softs EFX support), has much better support for widescreen resolutions and has 64bit support.
Note that while the Doom 3 source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Dhewm 3 the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/dhewm3-appimage

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Dhewm3
(Shooter)
Dhewm 3 is a source port of the original Doom 3 (not Doom 3 BFG, for that you may want to try RBDoom3BFG). It's known to work on Windows, Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, OpenBSD and AROS, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.4 with ARB shaders, SDL and OpenAL.
Compared to the original version of Doom 3, Dhewm 3 has many bugfixes, supports EAX-like sound effects on all operating systems and hardware (via OpenAL Softs EFX support), has much better support for widescreen resolutions and has 64bit support.
Note that while the Doom 3 source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Dhewm 3 the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/dhewm3-appimage

[read more]

item.title: Yamagi Quake II [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Yamagi Quake II [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
Yamagi Quake II
(Shooter)
Yamagi Quake II is an alternative client for id Software's Quake II. Our goal is to provide the best Quake II experience possible, we strive to preserve the gameplay as it was back in 1997. Thus we aim mostly for bug fixes, stability and gentle enhancements were appropriate. Yamagi Quake II has a lot of unique features. The most notables ones are:
A modern OpenGL 3.2 renderer, providing a greatly enhanced look and feel. The original OpenGL 1.4 and even the Software renderers are still supported. Both 3D accelerated renderers support anisotropic filtering and multisampling anti aliasing.
Full support for widescreen displays and arbitrary resolutions. The HUD can be scaled to be readable on high resolutions.
Support for surround sound, from stereo up to 7.1 channels and even HRTF. The background music can be played from OGG/Vorbis files, a CD drive is no longer necessary.
A rewritten savegame system. Yamagi Quake II savegames are completely reliable and backward compatible between releases as long as the principle architecture stays the same.
Highly precise timings. For example, on a flat panel display with a 59.95 hertz refresh rate and vertical synchronisation (VSync) enabled Yamagi Quake II is running at exactly 59.95 frames per second.
In comparison with the original client over 1.500 bugs were fixed. The Yamagi Quake II client is very well tested and stable. The dedicated server is able to run for weeks without a single restart. Last but not least the code is fully 64 bit clean and highly portable.

Commercial data files are required to run the supported game. These can be aquired though a multitude of sources. See the manual for more info on this.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/yquake2-appimage

[read more]
item.description:
Yamagi Quake II
(Shooter)
Yamagi Quake II is an alternative client for id Software's Quake II. Our goal is to provide the best Quake II experience possible, we strive to preserve the gameplay as it was back in 1997. Thus we aim mostly for bug fixes, stability and gentle enhancements were appropriate. Yamagi Quake II has a lot of unique features. The most notables ones are:
A modern OpenGL 3.2 renderer, providing a greatly enhanced look and feel. The original OpenGL 1.4 and even the Software renderers are still supported. Both 3D accelerated renderers support anisotropic filtering and multisampling anti aliasing.
Full support for widescreen displays and arbitrary resolutions. The HUD can be scaled to be readable on high resolutions.
Support for surround sound, from stereo up to 7.1 channels and even HRTF. The background music can be played from OGG/Vorbis files, a CD drive is no longer necessary.
A rewritten savegame system. Yamagi Quake II savegames are completely reliable and backward compatible between releases as long as the principle architecture stays the same.
Highly precise timings. For example, on a flat panel display with a 59.95 hertz refresh rate and vertical synchronisation (VSync) enabled Yamagi Quake II is running at exactly 59.95 frames per second.
In comparison with the original client over 1.500 bugs were fixed. The Yamagi Quake II client is very well tested and stable. The dedicated server is able to run for weeks without a single restart. Last but not least the code is fully 64 bit clean and highly portable.

Commercial data files are required to run the supported game. These can be aquired though a multitude of sources. See the manual for more info on this.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/yquake2-appimage

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Yamagi Quake II
(Shooter)
Yamagi Quake II is an alternative client for id Software's Quake II. Our goal is to provide the best Quake II experience possible, we strive to preserve the gameplay as it was back in 1997. Thus we aim mostly for bug fixes, stability and gentle enhancements were appropriate. Yamagi Quake II has a lot of unique features. The most notables ones are:
A modern OpenGL 3.2 renderer, providing a greatly enhanced look and feel. The original OpenGL 1.4 and even the Software renderers are still supported. Both 3D accelerated renderers support anisotropic filtering and multisampling anti aliasing.
Full support for widescreen displays and arbitrary resolutions. The HUD can be scaled to be readable on high resolutions.
Support for surround sound, from stereo up to 7.1 channels and even HRTF. The background music can be played from OGG/Vorbis files, a CD drive is no longer necessary.
A rewritten savegame system. Yamagi Quake II savegames are completely reliable and backward compatible between releases as long as the principle architecture stays the same.
Highly precise timings. For example, on a flat panel display with a 59.95 hertz refresh rate and vertical synchronisation (VSync) enabled Yamagi Quake II is running at exactly 59.95 frames per second.
In comparison with the original client over 1.500 bugs were fixed. The Yamagi Quake II client is very well tested and stable. The dedicated server is able to run for weeks without a single restart. Last but not least the code is fully 64 bit clean and highly portable.

Commercial data files are required to run the supported game. These can be aquired though a multitude of sources. See the manual for more info on this.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/yquake2-appimage

[read more]

item.title: ioquake3 [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: ioquake3 [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
ioquake3
(Shooter)
ioquake3 is a free and open-source software first person shooter engine based on the Quake 3: Arena and Quake 3: Team Arena source code.
The source code is licensed under the GPL version 2, and was first released under that license by id software on August 20th, 2005. Since then,
our dedicated team has been working hard to improve it, fixing bugs, and adding just the right new features to make the engine even better than before.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/ioquake3-appimage
[read more]
item.description:
ioquake3
(Shooter)
ioquake3 is a free and open-source software first person shooter engine based on the Quake 3: Arena and Quake 3: Team Arena source code.
The source code is licensed under the GPL version 2, and was first released under that license by id software on August 20th, 2005. Since then,
our dedicated team has been working hard to improve it, fixing bugs, and adding just the right new features to make the engine even better than before.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/ioquake3-appimage
[read more]

ioquake3
(Shooter)
ioquake3 is a free and open-source software first person shooter engine based on the Quake 3: Arena and Quake 3: Team Arena source code.
The source code is licensed under the GPL version 2, and was first released under that license by id software on August 20th, 2005. Since then,
our dedicated team has been working hard to improve it, fixing bugs, and adding just the right new features to make the engine even better than before.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/ioquake3-appimage
[read more]

item.title: Simple File Transfer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Simple File Transfer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: clearall2
item.itunes:summary:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
Note (24/02/2024):
-This project is now active again
-Please visit https://clearall2.github.io/SimpleFileTransferApp/ for latest updates

This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in a network.
If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]
item.description:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
Note (24/02/2024):
-This project is now active again
-Please visit https://clearall2.github.io/SimpleFileTransferApp/ for latest updates

This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in a network.
If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
Note (24/02/2024):
-This project is now active again
-Please visit https://clearall2.github.io/SimpleFileTransferApp/ for latest updates

This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in a network.
If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]

item.title: Kid3 [MP3 Taggers]
item.itunes:title: Kid3 [MP3 Taggers]
item.itunes:author: ufleisch
item.itunes:summary:
Kid3
(MP3 Taggers)
If you want to easily tag multiple MP3, Ogg/Vorbis, Opus, DSF, FLAC, MPC, MP4/AAC, MP2, Opus, Speex, TrueAudio, WavPack and WMA files (e.g. full albums) without typing the same information again and again and have control over both ID3v1 and ID3v2 tags, then Kid3 is the program you are looking for.
With Kid3 you can:
- Edit ID3v1.1 tags
- Edit all ID3v2.3 and ID3v2.4 frames
- Convert between ID3v1.1, ID3v2.3 and ID3v2.4 tags
- Edit tags in MP3, Ogg/Vorbis, FLAC, MPC, MP4/AAC, MP2, Speex, TrueAudio, WavPack, WMA, AIFF and WAV files
- Edit tags of multiple files, e.g. the artist, album, year and genre of all files of an album typically have the same values and can be set together.
- Generate tags from filenames
- Generate tags from the contents of tag fields
- Generate filenames from tags
- Rename and create directories from tags
- Generate playlist files
- Automatically convert upper and lower case and replace strings
- Import from freedb2.org, MusicBrainz, Discogs, Amazon and other sources of album data
- Export tags as CSV, HTML, playlists, Kover XML and in other formats
- Edit synchronized lyrics and event timing codes, import and export LRC files
[read more]
item.description:
Kid3
(MP3 Taggers)
If you want to easily tag multiple MP3, Ogg/Vorbis, Opus, DSF, FLAC, MPC, MP4/AAC, MP2, Opus, Speex, TrueAudio, WavPack and WMA files (e.g. full albums) without typing the same information again and again and have control over both ID3v1 and ID3v2 tags, then Kid3 is the program you are looking for.
With Kid3 you can:
- Edit ID3v1.1 tags
- Edit all ID3v2.3 and ID3v2.4 frames
- Convert between ID3v1.1, ID3v2.3 and ID3v2.4 tags
- Edit tags in MP3, Ogg/Vorbis, FLAC, MPC, MP4/AAC, MP2, Speex, TrueAudio, WavPack, WMA, AIFF and WAV files
- Edit tags of multiple files, e.g. the artist, album, year and genre of all files of an album typically have the same values and can be set together.
- Generate tags from filenames
- Generate tags from the contents of tag fields
- Generate filenames from tags
- Rename and create directories from tags
- Generate playlist files
- Automatically convert upper and lower case and replace strings
- Import from freedb2.org, MusicBrainz, Discogs, Amazon and other sources of album data
- Export tags as CSV, HTML, playlists, Kover XML and in other formats
- Edit synchronized lyrics and event timing codes, import and export LRC files
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Kid3
(MP3 Taggers)
If you want to easily tag multiple MP3, Ogg/Vorbis, Opus, DSF, FLAC, MPC, MP4/AAC, MP2, Opus, Speex, TrueAudio, WavPack and WMA files (e.g. full albums) without typing the same information again and again and have control over both ID3v1 and ID3v2 tags, then Kid3 is the program you are looking for.
With Kid3 you can:
- Edit ID3v1.1 tags
- Edit all ID3v2.3 and ID3v2.4 frames
- Convert between ID3v1.1, ID3v2.3 and ID3v2.4 tags
- Edit tags in MP3, Ogg/Vorbis, FLAC, MPC, MP4/AAC, MP2, Speex, TrueAudio, WavPack, WMA, AIFF and WAV files
- Edit tags of multiple files, e.g. the artist, album, year and genre of all files of an album typically have the same values and can be set together.
- Generate tags from filenames
- Generate tags from the contents of tag fields
- Generate filenames from tags
- Rename and create directories from tags
- Generate playlist files
- Automatically convert upper and lower case and replace strings
- Import from freedb2.org, MusicBrainz, Discogs, Amazon and other sources of album data
- Export tags as CSV, HTML, playlists, Kover XML and in other formats
- Edit synchronized lyrics and event timing codes, import and export LRC files

item.title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.
Hey there, fellow gamers! Have you heard the exciting news? The Nubia Red Magic's Game Space has been expertly ported for all Android devices, thanks to the amazing work of RevWhiteShadow. If you're a mobile gaming enthusiast like me, this is something you definitely don't want to miss out on!

So, what exactly is the Game Space? Let me break it down for you. This innovative feature is designed to optimize your device specifically for gaming, providing you with an unparalleled gaming experience. It works by enhancing your device's performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay, all in one convenient space.

Imagine diving into your favorite mobile games without having to worry about lags or interruptions. That's exactly what the Game Space offers. With its expertly ported version, you can enjoy lightning-fast speeds and precision like never before. It's truly the ultimate playground for mobile gamers.

Now, let's address some common questions you might have about the Game Space:

1. What games are compatible with Game Space?
Game Space is compatible with a wide range of mobile games, from popular titles to indie gems. Whether you're into action, adventure, strategy, or racing games, you'll find something to love in the Game Space library.

2. How does Game Space enhance gaming performance?
Game Space optimizes your device's resources to ensure smooth and seamless gameplay. It minimizes background processes, allocates more CPU and GPU power to your games, and prioritizes network connectivity, all of which contribute to an enhanced gaming experience.

3. Can I customize Game Space settings to suit my preferences?
Absolutely! Game Space allows you to customize various settings according to your preferences. You can adjust performance settings, enable or disable notifications, and even create custom profiles for different games.

4. Is Game Space safe to use?
Yes, Game Space is completely safe to use. It's been thoroughly tested and vetted to ensure that it meets the highest standards of security and performance.

So, what are you waiting for? Take your mobile gaming experience to the next level with the Game Space ported for all Android devices. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever gamed without it!
[read more]

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.
Hey there, fellow gamers! Have you heard the exciting news? The Nubia Red Magic's Game Space has been expertly ported for all Android devices, thanks to the amazing work of RevWhiteShadow. If you're a mobile gaming enthusiast like me, this is something you definitely don't want to miss out on!

Imagine diving into your favorite mobile games without having to worry about lags or interruptions. That's exactly what the Game Space offers. So, what are you waiting for? Take your mobile gaming experience to the next level with the Game Space ported for all Android devices. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever gamed without it!

GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.
Hey there, fellow gamers! Have you heard the exciting news? The Nubia Red Magic's Game Space has been expertly ported for all Android devices, thanks to the amazing work of RevWhiteShadow. If you're a mobile gaming enthusiast like me, this is something you definitely don't want to miss out on!

So, what exactly is the Game Space? Let me break it down for you. This innovative feature is designed to optimize your device specifically for gaming, providing you with an unparalleled gaming experience. It works by enhancing your device's performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay, all in one convenient space.

Imagine diving into your favorite mobile games without having to worry about lags or interruptions. That's exactly what the Game Space offers. With its expertly ported version, you can enjoy lightning-fast speeds and precision like never before. It's truly the ultimate playground for mobile gamers.

Now, let's address some common questions you might have about the Game Space:

Absolutely! Game Space allows you to customize various settings according to your preferences. You can adjust performance settings, enable or disable notifications, and even create custom profiles for different games.

4. Is Game Space safe to use?
Yes, Game Space is completely safe to use. It's been thoroughly tested and vetted to ensure that it meets the highest standards of security and performance.

So, what are you waiting for? Take your mobile gaming experience to the next level with the Game Space ported for all Android devices. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever gamed without it!

item.title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: t3sl4
item.itunes:summary:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
